evals.prompt: I need to set up a 5-step email sequence in Apollo for cold outbound to VP Marketing
evals.expected_output: Apollo sequence configuration walkthrough with settings, step timing, mailbox rotation, and deliverability checklist

assertions.name: sequence_settings
assertions.description: Configures key settings (auto type, stop on reply, business hours)

assertions.name: cadence_handoff
assertions.description: Points to /sales-cadence for the actual email copy and strategy

evals.prompt: My Apollo sequence open rate dropped from 55% to 25% over the past month
evals.expected_output: Deliverability diagnosis covering domain auth, sending volume, mailbox health, and content triggers

assertions.name: volume_review
assertions.description: Reviews sending volume and whether it spiked recently

assertions.name: command_center
assertions.description: References Apollo's Deliverability Command Center for monitoring

evals.prompt: I want to A/B test my first email's subject line in Apollo
evals.expected_output: A/B test setup guide with variant creation, split configuration, and evaluation criteria

assertions.name: plan_check
assertions.description: Verifies user is on Professional+ plan (A/B testing not on Basic)

assertions.name: setup_steps
assertions.description: Walks through creating Variant B in the sequence editor

assertions.name: sample_size
assertions.description: Recommends at least 100 sends per variant before evaluating
